svg.title: Two conversation turns with a banking assistant, showing the frame growing as history accumulates
svg.desc: Turn one sends a short system prompt and a question with no history; the data center replies within the MTU. Turn two sends the system prompt, the conversation history, and a new question; the frame is larger, and the data center replies again within the MTU. Three numbered ideas summarize the lesson.
svg.text: 1. Turn 1 — the frame your app sends (no history yet)
2. Turn 1 — the data center replies (within MTU)
3. Turn 2 — the frame is now BIGGER (turn 1 became history)
4. Turn 2 — the data center replies (still within MTU)
you pay its tokens each time
